392	/** @internal */
393	export const enum SemanticMeaning {
394	    None = 0x0,
395	    Value = 0x1,
396	    Type = 0x2,
397	    Namespace = 0x4,
398	    All = Value | Type | Namespace,
399	}
400	
401	/** @internal */
402	export function getMeaningFromDeclaration(node: Node): SemanticMeaning {
403	    switch (node.kind) {
404	        case SyntaxKind.VariableDeclaration:
405	            return isInJSFile(node) && getJSDocEnumTag(node) ? SemanticMeaning.All : SemanticMeaning.Value;
406	
407	        case SyntaxKind.Parameter:
408	        case SyntaxKind.BindingElement:
409	        case SyntaxKind.PropertyDeclaration:
410	        case SyntaxKind.PropertySignature:
411	        case SyntaxKind.PropertyAssignment:
412	        case SyntaxKind.ShorthandPropertyAssignment:
413	        case SyntaxKind.MethodDeclaration:
414	        case SyntaxKind.MethodSignature:
415	        case SyntaxKind.Constructor:
416	        case SyntaxKind.GetAccessor:
417	        case SyntaxKind.SetAccessor:
418	        case SyntaxKind.FunctionDeclaration:
419	        case SyntaxKind.FunctionExpression:
420	        case SyntaxKind.ArrowFunction:
421	        case SyntaxKind.CatchClause:
422	        case SyntaxKind.JsxAttribute:
423	            return SemanticMeaning.Value;
424	
425	        case SyntaxKind.TypeParameter:
426	        case SyntaxKind.InterfaceDeclaration:
427	        case SyntaxKind.TypeAliasDeclaration:
428	        case SyntaxKind.TypeLiteral:
429	            return SemanticMeaning.Type;
430	
431	        case SyntaxKind.JSDocTypedefTag:
432	            // If it has no name node, it shares the name with the value declaration below it.
433	            return (node as JSDocTypedefTag).name === undefined ? SemanticMeaning.Value | SemanticMeaning.Type : SemanticMeaning.Type;
434	
435	        case SyntaxKind.EnumMember:
436	        case SyntaxKind.ClassDeclaration:
437	            return SemanticMeaning.Value | SemanticMeaning.Type;
438	
439	        case SyntaxKind.ModuleDeclaration:
440	            if (isAmbientModule(node as ModuleDeclaration)) {
441	                return SemanticMeaning.Namespace | SemanticMeaning.Value;
442	            }
443	            else if (getModuleInstanceState(node as ModuleDeclaration) === ModuleInstanceState.Instantiated) {
444	                return SemanticMeaning.Namespace | SemanticMeaning.Value;
445	            }
446	            else {
447	                return SemanticMeaning.Namespace;
448	            }
449	
450	        case SyntaxKind.EnumDeclaration:
451	        case SyntaxKind.NamedImports:
452	        case SyntaxKind.ImportSpecifier:
453	        case SyntaxKind.ImportEqualsDeclaration:
454	        case SyntaxKind.ImportDeclaration:
455	        case SyntaxKind.ExportAssignment:
456	        case SyntaxKind.ExportDeclaration:
457	            return SemanticMeaning.All;
458	
459	        // An external module can be a Value
460	        case SyntaxKind.SourceFile:
461	            return SemanticMeaning.Namespace | SemanticMeaning.Value;
462	    }
463	
464	    return SemanticMeaning.All;
465	}
466	
467	/** @internal */
468	export function getMeaningFromLocation(node: Node): SemanticMeaning {
469	    node = getAdjustedReferenceLocation(node);
470	    const parent = node.parent;
471	    if (node.kind === SyntaxKind.SourceFile) {
472	        return SemanticMeaning.Value;
473	    }
474	    else if (
475	        isExportAssignment(parent)
476	        || isExportSpecifier(parent)
477	        || isExternalModuleReference(parent)
478	        || isImportSpecifier(parent)
479	        || isImportClause(parent)
480	        || isImportEqualsDeclaration(parent) && node === parent.name
481	    ) {
482	        return SemanticMeaning.All;
483	    }
484	    else if (isInRightSideOfInternalImportEqualsDeclaration(node)) {
485	        return getMeaningFromRightHandSideOfImportEquals(node as Identifier);
486	    }
487	    else if (isDeclarationName(node)) {
488	        return getMeaningFromDeclaration(parent);
489	    }
490	    else if (isEntityName(node) && findAncestor(node, or(isJSDocNameReference, isJSDocLinkLike, isJSDocMemberName))) {
491	        return SemanticMeaning.All;
492	    }
493	    else if (isTypeReference(node)) {
494	        return SemanticMeaning.Type;
495	    }
496	    else if (isNamespaceReference(node)) {
497	        return SemanticMeaning.Namespace;
498	    }
499	    else if (isTypeParameterDeclaration(parent)) {
500	        Debug.assert(isJSDocTemplateTag(parent.parent)); // Else would be handled by isDeclarationName
501	        return SemanticMeaning.Type;
502	    }
503	    else if (isLiteralTypeNode(parent)) {
504	        // This might be T["name"], which is actually referencing a property and not a type. So allow both meanings.
505	        return SemanticMeaning.Type | SemanticMeaning.Value;
506	    }
507	    else {
508	        return SemanticMeaning.Value;
509	    }
510	}
511	
512	function getMeaningFromRightHandSideOfImportEquals(node: Node): SemanticMeaning {
513	    //     import a = |b|; // Namespace
514	    //     import a = |b.c|; // Value, type, namespace
515	    //     import a = |b.c|.d; // Namespace
516	    const name = node.kind === SyntaxKind.QualifiedName ? node : isQualifiedName(node.parent) && node.parent.right === node ? node.parent : undefined;
517	    return name && name.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.ImportEqualsDeclaration ? SemanticMeaning.All : SemanticMeaning.Namespace;
518	}
519	
520	/** @internal */
521	export function isInRightSideOfInternalImportEqualsDeclaration(node: Node): boolean {
522	    if (!node.parent) {
523	        return false;
524	    }
525	    while (node.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.QualifiedName) {
526	        node = node.parent;
527	    }
528	    return isInternalModuleImportEqualsDeclaration(node.parent) && node.parent.moduleReference === node;
529	}
530	
531	function isNamespaceReference(node: Node): boolean {
532	    return isQualifiedNameNamespaceReference(node) || isPropertyAccessNamespaceReference(node);
533	}
534	
535	function isQualifiedNameNamespaceReference(node: Node): boolean {
536	    let root = node;
537	    let isLastClause = true;
538	    if (root.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.QualifiedName) {
539	        while (root.parent && root.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.QualifiedName) {
540	            root = root.parent;
541	        }
542	
543	        isLastClause = (root as QualifiedName).right === node;
544	    }
545	
546	    return root.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.TypeReference && !isLastClause;
547	}
548	
549	function isPropertyAccessNamespaceReference(node: Node): boolean {
550	    let root = node;
551	    let isLastClause = true;
552	    if (root.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.PropertyAccessExpression) {
553	        while (root.parent && root.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.PropertyAccessExpression) {
554	            root = root.parent;
555	        }
556	
557	        isLastClause = (root as PropertyAccessExpression).name === node;
558	    }
559	
560	    if (!isLastClause && root.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.ExpressionWithTypeArguments && root.parent.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.HeritageClause) {
561	        const decl = root.parent.parent.parent;
562	        return (decl.kind === SyntaxKind.ClassDeclaration && (root.parent.parent as HeritageClause).token === SyntaxKind.ImplementsKeyword) ||
563	            (decl.kind === SyntaxKind.InterfaceDeclaration && (root.parent.parent as HeritageClause).token === SyntaxKind.ExtendsKeyword);
564	    }
565	
566	    return false;
567	}
568	
569	function isTypeReference(node: Node): boolean {
570	    if (isRightSideOfQualifiedNameOrPropertyAccess(node)) {
571	        node = node.parent;
572	    }
573	
574	    switch (node.kind) {
575	        case SyntaxKind.ThisKeyword:
576	            return !isExpressionNode(node);
577	        case SyntaxKind.ThisType:
578	            return true;
579	    }
580	
581	    switch (node.parent.kind) {
582	        case SyntaxKind.TypeReference:
583	            return true;
584	        case SyntaxKind.ImportType:
585	            return !(node.parent as ImportTypeNode).isTypeOf;
586	        case SyntaxKind.ExpressionWithTypeArguments:
587	            return isPartOfTypeNode(node.parent);
588	    }
589	
590	    return false;
591	}

593	/** @internal */
594	export function isCallExpressionTarget(node: Node, includeElementAccess = false, skipPastOuterExpressions = false): boolean {
595	    return isCalleeWorker(node, isCallExpression, selectExpressionOfCallOrNewExpressionOrDecorator, includeElementAccess, skipPastOuterExpressions);
596	}

598	/** @internal */
599	export function isNewExpressionTarget(node: Node, includeElementAccess = false, skipPastOuterExpressions = false): boolean {
600	    return isCalleeWorker(node, isNewExpression, selectExpressionOfCallOrNewExpressionOrDecorator, includeElementAccess, skipPastOuterExpressions);
601	}

603	/** @internal */
604	export function isCallOrNewExpressionTarget(node: Node, includeElementAccess = false, skipPastOuterExpressions = false): boolean {
605	    return isCalleeWorker(node, isCallOrNewExpression, selectExpressionOfCallOrNewExpressionOrDecorator, includeElementAccess, skipPastOuterExpressions);
606	}

608	/** @internal */
609	export function isTaggedTemplateTag(node: Node, includeElementAccess = false, skipPastOuterExpressions = false): boolean {
610	    return isCalleeWorker(node, isTaggedTemplateExpression, selectTagOfTaggedTemplateExpression, includeElementAccess, skipPastOuterExpressions);
611	}

613	/** @internal */
614	export function isDecoratorTarget(node: Node, includeElementAccess = false, skipPastOuterExpressions = false): boolean {
615	    return isCalleeWorker(node, isDecorator, selectExpressionOfCallOrNewExpressionOrDecorator, includeElementAccess, skipPastOuterExpressions);
616	}

618	/** @internal */
619	export function isJsxOpeningLikeElementTagName(node: Node, includeElementAccess = false, skipPastOuterExpressions = false): boolean {
620	    return isCalleeWorker(node, isJsxOpeningLikeElement, selectTagNameOfJsxOpeningLikeElement, includeElementAccess, skipPastOuterExpressions);
621	}
622	
623	function selectExpressionOfCallOrNewExpressionOrDecorator(node: CallExpression | NewExpression | Decorator) {
624	    return node.expression;
625	}
626	
627	function selectTagOfTaggedTemplateExpression(node: TaggedTemplateExpression) {
628	    return node.tag;
629	}
630	
631	function selectTagNameOfJsxOpeningLikeElement(node: JsxOpeningLikeElement) {
632	    return node.tagName;
633	}
634	
635	function isCalleeWorker<T extends CallExpression | NewExpression | TaggedTemplateExpression | Decorator | JsxOpeningLikeElement>(node: Node, pred: (node: Node) => node is T, calleeSelector: (node: T) => Expression | JsxTagNameExpression, includeElementAccess: boolean, skipPastOuterExpressions: boolean) {
636	    let target = includeElementAccess ? climbPastPropertyOrElementAccess(node) : climbPastPropertyAccess(node);
637	    if (skipPastOuterExpressions) {
638	        target = skipOuterExpressions(target);
639	    }
640	    return !!target && !!target.parent && pred(target.parent) && calleeSelector(target.parent) === target;
641	}
642	
643	/** @internal */
644	export function climbPastPropertyAccess(node: Node): Node {
645	    return isRightSideOfPropertyAccess(node) ? node.parent : node;
646	}
647	
648	function climbPastPropertyOrElementAccess(node: Node) {
649	    return isRightSideOfPropertyAccess(node) || isArgumentExpressionOfElementAccess(node) ? node.parent : node;
650	}

652	/** @internal */
653	export function getTargetLabel(referenceNode: Node, labelName: string): Identifier | undefined {
654	    while (referenceNode) {
655	        if (referenceNode.kind === SyntaxKind.LabeledStatement && (referenceNode as LabeledStatement).label.escapedText === labelName) {
656	            return (referenceNode as LabeledStatement).label;
657	        }
658	        referenceNode = referenceNode.parent;
659	    }
660	    return undefined;
661	}

669	    return node.expression.name.text === funcName;

698	export function isRightSideOfPropertyAccess(node: Node): boolean {

702	/** @internal */
703	export function isArgumentExpressionOfElementAccess(node: Node): boolean {

705	}

707	/** @internal */
708	export function isNameOfModuleDeclaration(node: Node): boolean {

710	}

712	/** @internal */
713	export function isNameOfFunctionDeclaration(node: Node): boolean {

715	}

717	/** @internal */
718	export function isLiteralNameOfPropertyDeclarationOrIndexAccess(node: StringLiteral | NumericLiteral | NoSubstitutionTemplateLiteral): boolean {
719	    switch (node.parent.kind) {
720	        case SyntaxKind.PropertyDeclaration:
721	        case SyntaxKind.PropertySignature:
722	        case SyntaxKind.PropertyAssignment:
723	        case SyntaxKind.EnumMember:
724	        case SyntaxKind.MethodDeclaration:
725	        case SyntaxKind.MethodSignature:
726	        case SyntaxKind.GetAccessor:
727	        case SyntaxKind.SetAccessor:
728	        case SyntaxKind.ModuleDeclaration:
729	            return getNameOfDeclaration(node.parent as Declaration) === node;
730	        case SyntaxKind.ElementAccessExpression:
731	            return (node.parent as ElementAccessExpression).argumentExpression === node;
732	        case SyntaxKind.ComputedPropertyName:
733	            return true;
734	        case SyntaxKind.LiteralType:
735	            return node.parent.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.IndexedAccessType;
736	        default:
737	            return false;
738	    }
739	}

741	/** @internal */
742	export function isExpressionOfExternalModuleImportEqualsDeclaration(node: Node): boolean {
743	    return isExternalModuleImportEqualsDeclaration(node.parent.parent) &&
744	        getExternalModuleImportEqualsDeclarationExpression(node.parent.parent) === node;
745	}

747	/** @internal */
748	export function getContainerNode(node: Node): Declaration | undefined {
749	    if (isJSDocTypeAlias(node)) {
750	        // This doesn't just apply to the node immediately under the comment, but to everything in its parent's scope.
751	        // node.parent = the JSDoc comment, node.parent.parent = the node having the comment.
752	        // Then we get parent again in the loop.
753	        node = node.parent.parent;
754	    }
755	
756	    while (true) {
757	        node = node.parent;
758	        if (!node) {
759	            return undefined;
760	        }
761	        switch (node.kind) {
762	            case SyntaxKind.SourceFile:
763	            case SyntaxKind.MethodDeclaration:
764	            case SyntaxKind.MethodSignature:
765	            case SyntaxKind.FunctionDeclaration:
766	            case SyntaxKind.FunctionExpression:
767	            case SyntaxKind.GetAccessor:
768	            case SyntaxKind.SetAccessor:
769	            case SyntaxKind.ClassDeclaration:
770	            case SyntaxKind.InterfaceDeclaration:
771	            case SyntaxKind.EnumDeclaration:
772	            case SyntaxKind.ModuleDeclaration:
773	                return node as Declaration;
774	        }
775	    }
776	}

778	/** @internal */
779	export function getNodeKind(node: Node): ScriptElementKind {
780	    switch (node.kind) {
781	        case SyntaxKind.SourceFile:
782	            return isExternalModule(node as SourceFile) ? ScriptElementKind.moduleElement : ScriptElementKind.scriptElement;
783	        case SyntaxKind.ModuleDeclaration:
784	            return ScriptElementKind.moduleElement;
785	        case SyntaxKind.ClassDeclaration:
786	        case SyntaxKind.ClassExpression:
787	            return ScriptElementKind.classElement;
788	        case SyntaxKind.InterfaceDeclaration:
789	            return ScriptElementKind.interfaceElement;
790	        case SyntaxKind.TypeAliasDeclaration:
791	        case SyntaxKind.JSDocCallbackTag:
792	        case SyntaxKind.JSDocTypedefTag:
793	            return ScriptElementKind.typeElement;
794	        case SyntaxKind.EnumDeclaration:
795	            return ScriptElementKind.enumElement;
796	        case SyntaxKind.VariableDeclaration:
797	            return getKindOfVariableDeclaration(node as VariableDeclaration);
798	        case SyntaxKind.BindingElement:
799	            return getKindOfVariableDeclaration(getRootDeclaration(node) as VariableDeclaration);
800	        case SyntaxKind.ArrowFunction:
801	        case SyntaxKind.FunctionDeclaration:
802	        case SyntaxKind.FunctionExpression:
803	            return ScriptElementKind.functionElement;
804	        case SyntaxKind.GetAccessor:
805	            return ScriptElementKind.memberGetAccessorElement;
806	        case SyntaxKind.SetAccessor:
807	            return ScriptElementKind.memberSetAccessorElement;
808	        case SyntaxKind.MethodDeclaration:
809	        case SyntaxKind.MethodSignature:
810	            return ScriptElementKind.memberFunctionElement;
811	        case SyntaxKind.PropertyAssignment:
812	            const { initializer } = node as PropertyAssignment;
813	            return isFunctionLike(initializer) ? ScriptElementKind.memberFunctionElement : ScriptElementKind.memberVariableElement;
814	        case SyntaxKind.PropertyDeclaration:
815	        case SyntaxKind.PropertySignature:
816	        case SyntaxKind.ShorthandPropertyAssignment:
817	        case SyntaxKind.SpreadAssignment:
818	            return ScriptElementKind.memberVariableElement;
819	        case SyntaxKind.IndexSignature:
820	            return ScriptElementKind.indexSignatureElement;
821	        case SyntaxKind.ConstructSignature:
822	            return ScriptElementKind.constructSignatureElement;
823	        case SyntaxKind.CallSignature:
824	            return ScriptElementKind.callSignatureElement;
825	        case SyntaxKind.Constructor:
826	        case SyntaxKind.ClassStaticBlockDeclaration:
827	            return ScriptElementKind.constructorImplementationElement;
828	        case SyntaxKind.TypeParameter:
829	            return ScriptElementKind.typeParameterElement;
830	        case SyntaxKind.EnumMember:
831	            return ScriptElementKind.enumMemberElement;
832	        case SyntaxKind.Parameter:
833	            return hasSyntacticModifier(node, ModifierFlags.ParameterPropertyModifier) ? ScriptElementKind.memberVariableElement : ScriptElementKind.parameterElement;
834	        case SyntaxKind.ImportEqualsDeclaration:
835	        case SyntaxKind.ImportSpecifier:
836	        case SyntaxKind.ExportSpecifier:
837	        case SyntaxKind.NamespaceImport:
838	        case SyntaxKind.NamespaceExport:
839	            return ScriptElementKind.alias;
840	        case SyntaxKind.BinaryExpression:
841	            const kind = getAssignmentDeclarationKind(node as BinaryExpression);
842	            const { right } = node as BinaryExpression;
843	            switch (kind) {
844	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.ObjectDefinePropertyValue:
845	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.ObjectDefinePropertyExports:
846	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.ObjectDefinePrototypeProperty:
847	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.None:
848	                    return ScriptElementKind.unknown;
849	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.ExportsProperty:
850	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.ModuleExports:
851	                    const rightKind = getNodeKind(right);
852	                    return rightKind === ScriptElementKind.unknown ? ScriptElementKind.constElement : rightKind;
853	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.PrototypeProperty:
854	                    return isFunctionExpression(right) ? ScriptElementKind.memberFunctionElement : ScriptElementKind.memberVariableElement;
855	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.ThisProperty:
856	                    return ScriptElementKind.memberVariableElement; // property
857	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.Property:
858	                    // static method / property
859	                    return isFunctionExpression(right) ? ScriptElementKind.memberFunctionElement : ScriptElementKind.memberVariableElement;
860	                case AssignmentDeclarationKind.Prototype:
861	                    return ScriptElementKind.localClassElement;
862	                default: {
863	                    assertType<never>(kind);
864	                    return ScriptElementKind.unknown;
865	                }
866	            }
867	        case SyntaxKind.Identifier:
868	            return isImportClause(node.parent) ? ScriptElementKind.alias : ScriptElementKind.unknown;
869	        case SyntaxKind.ExportAssignment:
870	            const scriptKind = getNodeKind((node as ExportAssignment).expression);
871	            // If the expression didn't come back with something (like it does for an identifiers)
872	            return scriptKind === ScriptElementKind.unknown ? ScriptElementKind.constElement : scriptKind;
873	        default:
874	            return ScriptElementKind.unknown;
875	    }
876	
877	    function getKindOfVariableDeclaration(v: VariableDeclaration): ScriptElementKind {
878	        return isVarConst(v)
879	            ? ScriptElementKind.constElement
880	            : isLet(v)
881	            ? ScriptElementKind.letElement
882	            : ScriptElementKind.variableElement;
883	    }
884	}

886	/** @internal */
887	export function isThis(node: Node): boolean {
888	    switch (node.kind) {
889	        case SyntaxKind.ThisKeyword:
890	            // case SyntaxKind.ThisType: TODO: GH#9267
891	            return true;
892	        case SyntaxKind.Identifier:
893	            // 'this' as a parameter
894	            return identifierIsThisKeyword(node as Identifier) && node.parent.kind === SyntaxKind.Parameter;
895	        default:
896	            return false;
897	    }
898	}

921	/** @internal */
922	export function rangeContainsPosition(r: TextRange, pos: number): boolean {

963	function isCompletedNode(n: Node | undefined, sourceFile: SourceFile): boolean {

970	        case SyntaxKind.InterfaceDeclaration:

972	        case SyntaxKind.ObjectLiteralExpression:
973	        case SyntaxKind.ObjectBindingPattern:
974	        case SyntaxKind.TypeLiteral:
975	        case SyntaxKind.Block:
976	        case SyntaxKind.ModuleBlock:

983	        case SyntaxKind.NewExpression:
984	            if (!(n as NewExpression).arguments) {

989	        case SyntaxKind.CallExpression:
990	        case SyntaxKind.ParenthesizedExpression:
991	        case SyntaxKind.ParenthesizedType:
992	            return nodeEndsWith(n, SyntaxKind.CloseParenToken, sourceFile);
993	
994	        case SyntaxKind.FunctionType:
995	        case SyntaxKind.ConstructorType:
996	            return isCompletedNode((n as SignatureDeclaration).type, sourceFile);
997	
998	        case SyntaxKind.Constructor:
999	        case SyntaxKind.GetAccessor:
1000	        case SyntaxKind.SetAccessor:
1001	        case SyntaxKind.FunctionDeclaration:
1002	        case SyntaxKind.FunctionExpression:
1003	        case SyntaxKind.MethodDeclaration:
1004	        case SyntaxKind.MethodSignature:
1005	        case SyntaxKind.ConstructSignature:
1006	        case SyntaxKind.CallSignature:
1007	        case SyntaxKind.ArrowFunction:

1009	                return isCompletedNode((n as FunctionLikeDeclaration).body, sourceFile);
1010	            }
1011	
1012	            if ((n as FunctionLikeDeclaration).type) {
1013	                return isCompletedNode((n as FunctionLikeDeclaration).type, sourceFile);
1014	            }
1015	
1016	            // Even though type parameters can be unclosed, we can get away with
1017	            // having at least a closing paren.
1018	            return hasChildOfKind(n, SyntaxKind.CloseParenToken, sourceFile);

1021	            return !!(n as ModuleDeclaration).body && isCompletedNode((n as ModuleDeclaration).body, sourceFile);
1022	
1023	        case SyntaxKind.IfStatement:
1024	            if ((n as IfStatement).elseStatement) {

1029	        case SyntaxKind.ExpressionStatement:

1031	                hasChildOfKind(n, SyntaxKind.SemicolonToken, sourceFile);
1032	
1033	        case SyntaxKind.ArrayLiteralExpression:
1034	        case SyntaxKind.ArrayBindingPattern:
1035	        case SyntaxKind.ElementAccessExpression:
1036	        case SyntaxKind.ComputedPropertyName:
1037	        case SyntaxKind.TupleType:
1038	            return nodeEndsWith(n, SyntaxKind.CloseBracketToken, sourceFile);
1039	
1040	        case SyntaxKind.IndexSignature:
1041	            if ((n as IndexSignatureDeclaration).type) {

1098	/*
1099	 * Checks if node ends with 'expectedLastToken'.
1100	 * If child at position 'length - 1' is 'SemicolonToken' it is skipped and 'expectedLastToken' is compared with child at position 'length - 2'.
1101	 */
1102	function nodeEndsWith(n: Node, expectedLastToken: SyntaxKind, sourceFile: SourceFile): boolean {
1103	    const children = n.getChildren(sourceFile);
1104	    if (children.length) {
1105	        const lastChild = last(children);
1106	        if (lastChild.kind === expectedLastToken) {
1107	            return true;
1108	        }
1109	        else if (lastChild.kind === SyntaxKind.SemicolonToken && children.length !== 1) {
1110	            return children[children.length - 2].kind === expectedLastToken;
1111	        }
1112	    }
1113	    return false;
1114	}

1116	/** @internal */
1117	export function findListItemInfo(node: Node): ListItemInfo | undefined {

1122	    // the span of node. If this happens, return undefined. The caller should
1123	    // handle this case.
1124	    if (!list) {

1126	    }

1132	        listItemIndex,
1133	        list,
1134	    };

1146	/** @internal */
1147	export function findContainingList(node: Node): SyntaxList | undefined {

1149	    // be parented by the container of the SyntaxList, not the SyntaxList itself.

447	 * is the module specifier of the suggestion. To avoid collisions,

524	function originIsThisType(origin: SymbolOriginInfo): boolean {
525	    return !!(origin.kind & SymbolOriginInfoKind.ThisType);
526	}

528	function originIsSymbolMember(origin: SymbolOriginInfo): boolean {
529	    return !!(origin.kind & SymbolOriginInfoKind.SymbolMember);
530	}

532	function originIsExport(origin: SymbolOriginInfo | undefined): origin is SymbolOriginInfoExport {
533	    return !!(origin && origin.kind & SymbolOriginInfoKind.Export);
534	}
535	
536	function originIsResolvedExport(origin: SymbolOriginInfo | undefined): origin is SymbolOriginInfoResolvedExport {
537	    return !!(origin && origin.kind & SymbolOriginInfoKind.ResolvedExport);
538	}

540	function originIncludesSymbolName(origin: SymbolOriginInfo | undefined): origin is SymbolOriginInfoExport | SymbolOriginInfoResolvedExport | SymbolOriginInfoComputedPropertyName {
541	    return originIsExport(origin) || originIsResolvedExport(origin) || originIsComputedPropertyName(origin);
542	}

544	function originIsPackageJsonImport(origin: SymbolOriginInfo | undefined): origin is SymbolOriginInfoExport {
545	    return (originIsExport(origin) || originIsResolvedExport(origin)) && !!origin.isFromPackageJson;
546	}

612	interface ModuleSpecifierResolutionContext {
613	    tryResolve: (exportInfo: readonly SymbolExportInfo[], isFromAmbientModule: boolean) => ModuleSpecifierResolutionResult;
614	    resolvedAny: () => boolean;
615	    skippedAny: () => boolean;
616	    resolvedBeyondLimit: () => boolean;
617	}
618	
619	type ModuleSpecifierResolutionResult = "skipped" | "failed" | {
620	    exportInfo?: SymbolExportInfo | FutureSymbolExportInfo;
621	    moduleSpecifier: string;
622	};
623	
624	function resolvingModuleSpecifiers<TReturn>(
625	    logPrefix: string,
626	    host: LanguageServiceHost,
627	    resolver: codefix.ImportSpecifierResolver,
628	    program: Program,
629	    position: number,
630	    preferences: UserPreferences,
631	    isForImportStatementCompletion: boolean,
632	    isValidTypeOnlyUseSite: boolean,
633	    cb: (context: ModuleSpecifierResolutionContext) => TReturn,
634	): TReturn {
635	    const start = timestamp();
636	    // Under `--moduleResolution nodenext` or `bundler`, we have to resolve module specifiers up front, because
637	    // package.json exports can mean we *can't* resolve a module specifier (that doesn't include a
638	    // relative path into node_modules), and we want to filter those completions out entirely.
639	    // Import statement completions always need specifier resolution because the module specifier is
640	    // part of their `insertText`, not the `codeActions` creating edits away from the cursor.
641	    // Finally, `autoImportSpecifierExcludeRegexes` necessitates eagerly resolving module specifiers
642	    // because completion items are being explcitly filtered out by module specifier.
643	    const needsFullResolution = isForImportStatementCompletion
644	        || getResolvePackageJsonExports(program.getCompilerOptions())
645	        || preferences.autoImportSpecifierExcludeRegexes?.length;
646	    let skippedAny = false;
647	    let ambientCount = 0;
648	    let resolvedCount = 0;
649	    let resolvedFromCacheCount = 0;
650	    let cacheAttemptCount = 0;
651	
652	    const result = cb({
653	        tryResolve,
654	        skippedAny: () => skippedAny,
655	        resolvedAny: () => resolvedCount > 0,
656	        resolvedBeyondLimit: () => resolvedCount > moduleSpecifierResolutionLimit,
657	    });
658	
659	    const hitRateMessage = cacheAttemptCount ? ` (${(resolvedFromCacheCount / cacheAttemptCount * 100).toFixed(1)}% hit rate)` : "";
660	    host.log?.(`${logPrefix}: resolved ${resolvedCount} module specifiers, plus ${ambientCount} ambient and ${resolvedFromCacheCount} from cache${hitRateMessage}`);
661	    host.log?.(`${logPrefix}: response is ${skippedAny ? "incomplete" : "complete"}`);
662	    host.log?.(`${logPrefix}: ${timestamp() - start}`);
663	    return result;
664	
665	    function tryResolve(exportInfo: readonly SymbolExportInfo[], isFromAmbientModule: boolean): ModuleSpecifierResolutionResult {
666	        if (isFromAmbientModule) {
667	            const result = resolver.getModuleSpecifierForBestExportInfo(exportInfo, position, isValidTypeOnlyUseSite);
668	            if (result) {
669	                ambientCount++;
670	            }
671	            return result || "failed";
672	        }
673	        const shouldResolveModuleSpecifier = needsFullResolution || preferences.allowIncompleteCompletions && resolvedCount < moduleSpecifierResolutionLimit;
674	        const shouldGetModuleSpecifierFromCache = !shouldResolveModuleSpecifier && preferences.allowIncompleteCompletions && cacheAttemptCount < moduleSpecifierResolutionCacheAttemptLimit;
675	        const result = (shouldResolveModuleSpecifier || shouldGetModuleSpecifierFromCache)
676	            ? resolver.getModuleSpecifierForBestExportInfo(exportInfo, position, isValidTypeOnlyUseSite, shouldGetModuleSpecifierFromCache)
677	            : undefined;
678	
679	        if (!shouldResolveModuleSpecifier && !shouldGetModuleSpecifierFromCache || shouldGetModuleSpecifierFromCache && !result) {
680	            skippedAny = true;
681	        }
682	
683	        resolvedCount += result?.computedWithoutCacheCount || 0;
684	        resolvedFromCacheCount += exportInfo.length - (result?.computedWithoutCacheCount || 0);
685	        if (shouldGetModuleSpecifierFromCache) {
686	            cacheAttemptCount++;
687	        }
688	
689	        return result || (needsFullResolution ? "failed" : "skipped");
690	    }
691	}

701	/** @internal */
702	export function getCompletionsAtPosition(
703	    host: LanguageServiceHost,
704	    program: Program,
705	    log: Log,
706	    sourceFile: SourceFile,
707	    position: number,
708	    preferences: UserPreferences,
709	    triggerCharacter: CompletionsTriggerCharacter | undefined,
710	    completionKind: CompletionTriggerKind | undefined,
711	    cancellationToken: CancellationToken,
712	    formatContext?: formatting.FormatContext,
713	    includeSymbol = false,
714	): CompletionInfo | undefined {
715	    const { previousToken } = getRelevantTokens(position, sourceFile);
716	    if (triggerCharacter && !isInString(sourceFile, position, previousToken) && !isValidTrigger(sourceFile, triggerCharacter, previousToken, position)) {
717	        return undefined;
718	    }
719	
720	    if (triggerCharacter === " ") {
721	        // `isValidTrigger` ensures we are at `import |`
722	        if (preferences.includeCompletionsForImportStatements && preferences.includeCompletionsWithInsertText) {
723	            return {
724	                isGlobalCompletion: true,
725	                isMemberCompletion: false,
726	                isNewIdentifierLocation: true,
727	                isIncomplete: true,
728	                entries: [],
729	                defaultCommitCharacters: getDefaultCommitCharacters(/*isNewIdentifierLocation*/ true),
730	            };
731	        }
732	        return undefined;
733	    }
734	
735	    const compilerOptions = program.getCompilerOptions();
736	    const checker = program.getTypeChecker();
737	    // If the request is a continuation of an earlier `isIncomplete` response,
738	    // we can continue it from the cached previous response.
739	    const incompleteCompletionsCache = preferences.allowIncompleteCompletions ? host.getIncompleteCompletionsCache?.() : undefined;
740	    if (incompleteCompletionsCache && completionKind === CompletionTriggerKind.TriggerForIncompleteCompletions && previousToken && isIdentifier(previousToken)) {
741	        const incompleteContinuation = continuePreviousIncompleteResponse(incompleteCompletionsCache, sourceFile, previousToken, program, host, preferences, cancellationToken, position);
742	        if (incompleteContinuation) {
743	            return incompleteContinuation;
744	        }
745	    }
746	    else {
747	        incompleteCompletionsCache?.clear();
748	    }
749	
750	    const stringCompletions = StringCompletions.getStringLiteralCompletions(sourceFile, position, previousToken, compilerOptions, host, program, log, preferences, includeSymbol);
751	    if (stringCompletions) {
752	        return stringCompletions;
753	    }
754	
755	    if (
756	        previousToken && isBreakOrContinueStatement(previousToken.parent)
757	        && (previousToken.kind === SyntaxKind.BreakKeyword || previousToken.kind === SyntaxKind.ContinueKeyword || previousToken.kind === SyntaxKind.Identifier)
758	    ) {
759	        return getLabelCompletionAtPosition(previousToken.parent);
760	    }
761	
762	    const completionData = getCompletionData(program, log, sourceFile, compilerOptions, position, preferences, /*detailsEntryId*/ undefined, host, formatContext, cancellationToken);
763	    if (!completionData) {
764	        return undefined;
765	    }
766	
767	    switch (completionData.kind) {
768	        case CompletionDataKind.Data:
769	            const response = completionInfoFromData(sourceFile, host, program, compilerOptions, log, completionData, preferences, formatContext, position, includeSymbol);
770	            if (response?.isIncomplete) {
771	                incompleteCompletionsCache?.set(response);
772	            }
773	            return response;
774	        case CompletionDataKind.JsDocTagName:
775	            // If the current position is a jsDoc tag name, only tag names should be provided for completion
776	            return jsdocCompletionInfo([
777	                ...JsDoc.getJSDocTagNameCompletions(),
778	                ...getJSDocParameterCompletions(
779	                    sourceFile,
780	                    position,
781	                    checker,
782	                    compilerOptions,
783	                    preferences,
784	                    /*tagNameOnly*/ true,
785	                ),
786	            ]);
787	        case CompletionDataKind.JsDocTag:
788	            // If the current position is a jsDoc tag, only tags should be provided for completion
789	            return jsdocCompletionInfo([
790	                ...JsDoc.getJSDocTagCompletions(),
791	                ...getJSDocParameterCompletions(
792	                    sourceFile,
793	                    position,
794	                    checker,
795	                    compilerOptions,
796	                    preferences,
797	                    /*tagNameOnly*/ false,
798	                ),
799	            ]);
800	        case CompletionDataKind.JsDocParameterName:
801	            return jsdocCompletionInfo(JsDoc.getJSDocParameterNameCompletions(completionData.tag));
802	        case CompletionDataKind.Keywords:
803	            return specificKeywordCompletionInfo(completionData.keywordCompletions, completionData.isNewIdentifierLocation);
804	        default:
805	            return Debug.assertNever(completionData);
806	    }
807	}

809	// Editors will use the `sortText` and then fall back to `name` for sorting, but leave ties in response order.
810	// So, it's important that we sort those ties in the order we want them displayed if it matters. We don't
811	// strictly need to sort by name or SortText here since clients are going to do it anyway, but we have to
812	// do the work of comparing them so we can sort those ties appropriately; plus, it makes the order returned
813	// by the language service consistent with what TS Server does and what editors typically do. This also makes
814	// completions tests make more sense. We used to sort only alphabetically and only in the server layer, but
815	// this made tests really weird, since most fourslash tests don't use the server.
816	function compareCompletionEntries(entryInArray: CompletionEntry, entryToInsert: CompletionEntry): Comparison {
817	    let result = compareStringsCaseSensitiveUI(entryInArray.sortText, entryToInsert.sortText);
818	    if (result === Comparison.EqualTo) {
819	        result = compareStringsCaseSensitiveUI(entryInArray.name, entryToInsert.name);
820	    }
821	    if (result === Comparison.EqualTo && entryInArray.data?.moduleSpecifier && entryToInsert.data?.moduleSpecifier) {
822	        // Sort same-named auto-imports by module specifier
823	        result = compareNumberOfDirectorySeparators(
824	            (entryInArray.data as CompletionEntryDataResolved).moduleSpecifier,
825	            (entryToInsert.data as CompletionEntryDataResolved).moduleSpecifier,
826	        );
827	    }
828	    if (result === Comparison.EqualTo) {
829	        // Fall back to symbol order - if we return `EqualTo`, `insertSorted` will put later symbols first.
830	        return Comparison.LessThan;
831	    }
832	    return result;
833	}
834	
835	function completionEntryDataIsResolved(data: CompletionEntryDataAutoImport | undefined): data is CompletionEntryDataResolved {
836	    return !!data?.moduleSpecifier;
837	}

839	function continuePreviousIncompleteResponse(
840	    cache: IncompleteCompletionsCache,
841	    file: SourceFile,
842	    location: Identifier,
843	    program: Program,
844	    host: LanguageServiceHost,
845	    preferences: UserPreferences,
846	    cancellationToken: CancellationToken,
847	    position: number,
848	): CompletionInfo | undefined {
849	    const previousResponse = cache.get();
850	    if (!previousResponse) return undefined;
851	
852	    const touchNode = getTouchingPropertyName(file, position);
853	    const lowerCaseTokenText = location.text.toLowerCase();
854	    const exportMap = getExportInfoMap(file, host, program, preferences, cancellationToken);
855	    const newEntries = resolvingModuleSpecifiers(
856	        "continuePreviousIncompleteResponse",
857	        host,
858	        codefix.createImportSpecifierResolver(file, program, host, preferences),
859	        program,
860	        location.getStart(),
861	        preferences,
862	        /*isForImportStatementCompletion*/ false,
863	        isValidTypeOnlyAliasUseSite(location),
864	        context => {
865	            const entries = mapDefined(previousResponse.entries, entry => {
866	                if (!entry.hasAction || !entry.source || !entry.data || completionEntryDataIsResolved(entry.data)) {
867	                    // Not an auto import or already resolved; keep as is
868	                    return entry;
869	                }
870	                if (!charactersFuzzyMatchInString(entry.name, lowerCaseTokenText)) {
871	                    // No longer matches typed characters; filter out
872	                    return undefined;
873	                }
874	
875	                const { origin } = Debug.checkDefined(getAutoImportSymbolFromCompletionEntryData(entry.name, entry.data, program, host));
876	                const info = exportMap.get(file.path, entry.data.exportMapKey);
877	
878	                const result = info && context.tryResolve(info, !isExternalModuleNameRelative(stripQuotes(origin.moduleSymbol.name)));
879	                if (result === "skipped") return entry;
880	                if (!result || result === "failed") {
881	                    host.log?.(`Unexpected failure resolving auto import for '${entry.name}' from '${entry.source}'`);
882	                    return undefined;
883	                }
884	
885	                const newOrigin: SymbolOriginInfoResolvedExport = {
886	                    ...origin,
887	                    kind: SymbolOriginInfoKind.ResolvedExport,
888	                    moduleSpecifier: result.moduleSpecifier,
889	                };
890	                // Mutating for performance... feels sketchy but nobody else uses the cache,
891	                // so why bother allocating a bunch of new objects?
892	                entry.data = originToCompletionEntryData(newOrigin);
893	                entry.source = getSourceFromOrigin(newOrigin);
894	                entry.sourceDisplay = [textPart(newOrigin.moduleSpecifier)];
895	                return entry;
896	            });
897	
898	            if (!context.skippedAny()) {
899	                previousResponse.isIncomplete = undefined;
900	            }
901	
902	            return entries;
903	        },
904	    );
905	
906	    previousResponse.entries = newEntries;
907	    previousResponse.flags = (previousResponse.flags || 0) | CompletionInfoFlags.IsContinuation;
908	    previousResponse.optionalReplacementSpan = getOptionalReplacementSpan(touchNode);
909	    return previousResponse;
910	}

917	        entries,
918	        defaultCommitCharacters: getDefaultCommitCharacters(/*isNewIdentifierLocation*/ false),

922	function getJSDocParameterCompletions(
923	    sourceFile: SourceFile,
924	    position: number,
925	    checker: TypeChecker,
926	    options: CompilerOptions,
927	    preferences: UserPreferences,
928	    tagNameOnly: boolean,
929	): CompletionEntry[] {
930	    const currentToken = getTokenAtPosition(sourceFile, position);
931	    if (!isJSDocTag(currentToken) && !isJSDoc(currentToken)) {
932	        return [];
933	    }
934	    const jsDoc = isJSDoc(currentToken) ? currentToken : currentToken.parent;
935	    if (!isJSDoc(jsDoc)) {
936	        return [];
937	    }
938	    const func = jsDoc.parent;
939	    if (!isFunctionLike(func)) {
940	        return [];
941	    }
942	
943	    const isJs = isSourceFileJS(sourceFile);
944	    const isSnippet = preferences.includeCompletionsWithSnippetText || undefined;
945	    const paramTagCount = countWhere(jsDoc.tags, tag => isJSDocParameterTag(tag) && tag.getEnd() <= position);

947	        if (getJSDocParameterTags(param).length) {
948	            return undefined; // Parameter is already annotated.
949	        }
950	        if (isIdentifier(param.name)) { // Named parameter
951	            const tabstopCounter = { tabstop: 1 };
952	            const paramName = param.name.text;
953	            let displayText = getJSDocParamAnnotation(
954	                paramName,
955	                param.initializer,
956	                param.dotDotDotToken,
957	                isJs,
958	                /*isObject*/ false,
959	                /*isSnippet*/ false,
960	                checker,
961	                options,
962	                preferences,
963	            );
964	            let snippetText = isSnippet
965	                ? getJSDocParamAnnotation(
966	                    paramName,
967	                    param.initializer,
968	                    param.dotDotDotToken,
969	                    isJs,
970	                    /*isObject*/ false,
971	                    /*isSnippet*/ true,
972	                    checker,
973	                    options,
974	                    preferences,
975	                    tabstopCounter,
976	                )
977	                : undefined;
978	            if (tagNameOnly) { // Remove `@`
979	                displayText = displayText.slice(1);
980	                if (snippetText) snippetText = snippetText.slice(1);
981	            }
982	            return {
983	                name: displayText,
984	                kind: ScriptElementKind.parameterElement,
985	                sortText: SortText.LocationPriority,
986	                insertText: isSnippet ? snippetText : undefined,
987	                isSnippet,
988	            };
989	        }
990	        else if (param.parent.parameters.indexOf(param) === paramTagCount) { // Destructuring parameter; do it positionally
991	            const paramPath = `param${paramTagCount}`;
992	            const displayTextResult = generateJSDocParamTagsForDestructuring(
993	                paramPath,
994	                param.name,
995	                param.initializer,
996	                param.dotDotDotToken,
997	                isJs,
998	                /*isSnippet*/ false,
999	                checker,
1000	                options,
1001	                preferences,
1002	            );
1003	            const snippetTextResult = isSnippet
1004	                ? generateJSDocParamTagsForDestructuring(
1005	                    paramPath,
1006	                    param.name,
1007	                    param.initializer,
1008	                    param.dotDotDotToken,
1009	                    isJs,
1010	                    /*isSnippet*/ true,
1011	                    checker,
1012	                    options,
1013	                    preferences,
1014	                )
1015	                : undefined;
1016	            let displayText = displayTextResult.join(getNewLineCharacter(options) + "* ");
1017	            let snippetText = snippetTextResult?.join(getNewLineCharacter(options) + "* ");
1018	            if (tagNameOnly) { // Remove `@`
1019	                displayText = displayText.slice(1);
1020	                if (snippetText) snippetText = snippetText.slice(1);
1021	            }
1022	            return {
1023	                name: displayText,
1024	                kind: ScriptElementKind.parameterElement,
1025	                sortText: SortText.LocationPriority,
1026	                insertText: isSnippet ? snippetText : undefined,
1027	                isSnippet,
1028	            };
1029	        }
1030	    });
1031	}

1033	function generateJSDocParamTagsForDestructuring(
1034	    path: string,
1035	    pattern: BindingPattern,
1036	    initializer: Expression | undefined,
1037	    dotDotDotToken: DotDotDotToken | undefined,
1038	    isJs: boolean,
1039	    isSnippet: boolean,
1040	    checker: TypeChecker,
1041	    options: CompilerOptions,
1042	    preferences: UserPreferences,
1043	): string[] {
1044	    if (!isJs) {
1045	        return [
1046	            getJSDocParamAnnotation(
1047	                path,
1048	                initializer,
1049	                dotDotDotToken,
1050	                isJs,
1051	                /*isObject*/ false,
1052	                isSnippet,
1053	                checker,
1054	                options,
1055	                preferences,
1056	                { tabstop: 1 },
1057	            ),
1058	        ];
1059	    }
1060	    return patternWorker(path, pattern, initializer, dotDotDotToken, { tabstop: 1 });

1062	    function patternWorker(
1063	        path: string,
1064	        pattern: BindingPattern,
1065	        initializer: Expression | undefined,
1066	        dotDotDotToken: DotDotDotToken | undefined,
1067	        counter: TabStopCounter,
1068	    ): string[] {
1069	        if (isObjectBindingPattern(pattern) && !dotDotDotToken) {
1070	            const oldTabstop = counter.tabstop;
1071	            const childCounter = { tabstop: oldTabstop };
1072	            const rootParam = getJSDocParamAnnotation(
1073	                path,
1074	                initializer,
1075	                dotDotDotToken,
1076	                isJs,
1077	                /*isObject*/ true,
1078	                isSnippet,
1079	                checker,
1080	                options,
1081	                preferences,
1082	                childCounter,
1083	            );
1084	            let childTags: string[] | undefined = [];
1085	            for (const element of pattern.elements) {
1086	                const elementTags = elementWorker(path, element, childCounter);
1087	                if (!elementTags) {
1088	                    childTags = undefined;
1089	                    break;
1090	                }
1091	                else {
1092	                    childTags.push(...elementTags);
1093	                }
1094	            }
1095	            if (childTags) {
1096	                counter.tabstop = childCounter.tabstop;
1097	                return [rootParam, ...childTags];
1098	            }
1099	        }
1100	        return [
1101	            getJSDocParamAnnotation(
1102	                path,
1103	                initializer,
1104	                dotDotDotToken,
1105	                isJs,
1106	                /*isObject*/ false,
1107	                isSnippet,
1108	                checker,
1109	                options,
1110	                preferences,
1111	                counter,
1112	            ),
1113	        ];

1115	
1116	    // Assumes binding element is inside object binding pattern.

1120	            const propertyName = element.propertyName ? tryGetTextOfPropertyName(element.propertyName) : element.name.text;
1121	            if (!propertyName) {
1122	                return undefined;
1123	            }
1124	            const paramName = `${path}.${propertyName}`;
1125	            return [
1126	                getJSDocParamAnnotation(
1127	                    paramName,
1128	                    element.initializer,
1129	                    element.dotDotDotToken,
1130	                    isJs,
1131	                    /*isObject*/ false,
1132	                    isSnippet,
1133	                    checker,
1134	                    options,
1135	                    preferences,
1136	                    counter,
1137	                ),
1138	            ];
1139	        }
1140	        else if (element.propertyName) { // `{ b: {...} }` or `{ b: [...] }`
1141	            const propertyName = tryGetTextOfPropertyName(element.propertyName);
1142	            return propertyName
1143	                && patternWorker(`${path}.${propertyName}`, element.name, element.initializer, element.dotDotDotToken, counter);
1144	        }
1145	        return undefined;
1146	    }
1147	}

1150	    tabstop: number;

1153	function getJSDocParamAnnotation(
1154	    paramName: string,
1155	    initializer: Expression | undefined,
1156	    dotDotDotToken: DotDotDotToken | undefined,
1157	    isJs: boolean,
1158	    isObject: boolean,
1159	    isSnippet: boolean,
1160	    checker: TypeChecker,
1161	    options: CompilerOptions,
1162	    preferences: UserPreferences,
1163	    tabstopCounter?: TabStopCounter,
1164	) {
1165	    if (isSnippet) {
1166	        Debug.assertIsDefined(tabstopCounter);
1167	    }
1168	    if (initializer) {
1169	        paramName = getJSDocParamNameWithInitializer(paramName, initializer);
1170	    }
1171	    if (isSnippet) {
1172	        paramName = escapeSnippetText(paramName);
1173	    }
1174	    if (isJs) {
1175	        let type = "*";
1176	        if (isObject) {
1177	            Debug.assert(!dotDotDotToken, `Cannot annotate a rest parameter with type 'Object'.`);
1178	            type = "Object";
1179	        }
1180	        else {
1181	            if (initializer) {
1182	                const inferredType = checker.getTypeAtLocation(initializer.parent);
1183	                if (!(inferredType.flags & (TypeFlags.Any | TypeFlags.Void))) {
1184	                    const sourceFile = initializer.getSourceFile();
1185	                    const quotePreference = getQuotePreference(sourceFile, preferences);
1186	                    const builderFlags = quotePreference === QuotePreference.Single ? NodeBuilderFlags.UseSingleQuotesForStringLiteralType : NodeBuilderFlags.None;
1187	                    const typeNode = checker.typeToTypeNode(inferredType, findAncestor(initializer, isFunctionLike), builderFlags);
1188	                    if (typeNode) {
1189	                        const printer = isSnippet
1190	                            ? createSnippetPrinter({
1191	                                removeComments: true,
1192	                                module: options.module,
1193	                                moduleResolution: options.moduleResolution,
1194	                                target: options.target,
1195	                            })
1196	                            : createPrinter({
1197	                                removeComments: true,
1198	                                module: options.module,
1199	                                moduleResolution: options.moduleResolution,
1200	                                target: options.target,
1201	                            });
1202	                        setEmitFlags(typeNode, EmitFlags.SingleLine);
1203	                        type = printer.printNode(EmitHint.Unspecified, typeNode, sourceFile);
1204	                    }
1205	                }
1206	            }
1207	            if (isSnippet && type === "*") {
1208	                type = `\${${tabstopCounter!.tabstop++}:${type}}`;
1209	            }
1210	        }
1211	        const dotDotDot = !isObject && dotDotDotToken ? "..." : "";
1212	        const description = isSnippet ? `\${${tabstopCounter!.tabstop++}}` : "";
1213	        return `@param {${dotDotDot}${type}} ${paramName} ${description}`;
1214	    }
1215	    else {
1216	        const description = isSnippet ? `\${${tabstopCounter!.tabstop++}}` : "";
1217	        return `@param ${paramName} ${description}`;
1218	    }
1219	}

1224	        return `[${paramName}]`;
1225	    }
1226	    return `[${paramName}=${initializerText}]`;
1227	}

1284	        contextToken,
1285	        completionKind,
1286	        isInSnippetScope,
1287	        isNewIdentifierLocation,
1288	        location,
1289	        propertyAccessToConvert,
1290	        keywordFilters,
1291	        symbolToOriginInfoMap,
1292	        recommendedCompletion,
1293	        isJsxInitializer,
1294	        isTypeOnlyLocation,
1295	        isJsxIdentifierExpected,
1296	        isRightOfOpenTag,
1297	        isRightOfDotOrQuestionDot,
1298	        importStatementCompletion,
1299	        insideJsDocTagTypeExpression,
1300	        symbolToSortTextMap,
1301	        hasUnresolvedAutoImports,
1302	        defaultCommitCharacters,
1303	    } = completionData;
1304	    let literals = completionData.literals;
1305	
1306	    const checker = program.getTypeChecker();
1307	
1308	    // Verify if the file is JSX language variant
1309	    if (getLanguageVariant(sourceFile.scriptKind) === LanguageVariant.JSX) {
1310	        const completionInfo = getJsxClosingTagCompletion(location, sourceFile);
1311	        if (completionInfo) {
1312	            return completionInfo;
1313	        }
1314	    }
1315	
1316	    // When the completion is for the expression of a case clause (e.g. `case |`),
1317	    // filter literals & enum symbols whose values are already present in existing case clauses.
1318	    const caseClause = findAncestor(contextToken, isCaseClause);
1319	    if (caseClause && (isCaseKeyword(contextToken!) || isNodeDescendantOf(contextToken!, caseClause.expression))) {
1320	        const tracker = newCaseClauseTracker(checker, caseClause.parent.clauses);
1321	        literals = literals.filter(literal => !tracker.hasValue(literal));
1322	        // The `symbols` array cannot be filtered directly, because to each symbol at position i in `symbols`,
1323	        // there might be a corresponding origin at position i in `symbolToOriginInfoMap`.
1324	        // So instead of filtering the `symbols` array, we mark symbols to be ignored.
1325	        symbols.forEach((symbol, i) => {
1326	            if (symbol.valueDeclaration && isEnumMember(symbol.valueDeclaration)) {
1327	                const value = checker.getConstantValue(symbol.valueDeclaration);
1328	                if (value !== undefined && tracker.hasValue(value)) {
1329	                    symbolToOriginInfoMap[i] = { kind: SymbolOriginInfoKind.Ignore };
1330	                }
1331	            }
1332	        });
1333	    }
1334	
1335	    const entries = createSortedArray<CompletionEntry>();
1336	    const isChecked = isCheckedFile(sourceFile, compilerOptions);
1337	    if (isChecked && !isNewIdentifierLocation && (!symbols || symbols.length === 0) && keywordFilters === KeywordCompletionFilters.None) {
1338	        return undefined;
1339	    }
1340	    const uniqueNames = getCompletionEntriesFromSymbols(
1341	        symbols,
1342	        entries,
1343	        /*replacementToken*/ undefined,
1344	        contextToken,
1345	        location,
1346	        position,
1347	        sourceFile,
1348	        host,
1349	        program,
1350	        getEmitScriptTarget(compilerOptions),
1351	        log,
1352	        completionKind,
1353	        preferences,
1354	        compilerOptions,
1355	        formatContext,
1356	        isTypeOnlyLocation,
1357	        propertyAccessToConvert,
1358	        isJsxIdentifierExpected,
1359	        isJsxInitializer,
1360	        importStatementCompletion,
1361	        recommendedCompletion,
1362	        symbolToOriginInfoMap,
1363	        symbolToSortTextMap,
1364	        isJsxIdentifierExpected,
1365	        isRightOfOpenTag,
1366	        includeSymbol,
1367	    );
1368	
1369	    if (keywordFilters !== KeywordCompletionFilters.None) {
1370	        for (const keywordEntry of getKeywordCompletions(keywordFilters, !insideJsDocTagTypeExpression && isSourceFileJS(sourceFile))) {
1371	            if (
1372	                isTypeOnlyLocation && isTypeKeyword(stringToToken(keywordEntry.name)!) ||
1373	                !isTypeOnlyLocation && isContextualKeywordInAutoImportableExpressionSpace(keywordEntry.name) ||
1374	                !uniqueNames.has(keywordEntry.name)
1375	            ) {
1376	                uniqueNames.add(keywordEntry.name);
1377	                insertSorted(entries, keywordEntry, compareCompletionEntries, /*equalityComparer*/ undefined, /*allowDuplicates*/ true);
1378	            }
1379	        }
1380	    }
1381	
1382	    for (const keywordEntry of getContextualKeywords(contextToken, position)) {
1383	        if (!uniqueNames.has(keywordEntry.name)) {
1384	            uniqueNames.add(keywordEntry.name);
1385	            insertSorted(entries, keywordEntry, compareCompletionEntries, /*equalityComparer*/ undefined, /*allowDuplicates*/ true);
1386	        }
1387	    }
1388	
1389	    for (const literal of literals) {
1390	        const literalEntry = createCompletionEntryForLiteral(sourceFile, preferences, literal);
1391	        uniqueNames.add(literalEntry.name);
1392	        insertSorted(entries, literalEntry, compareCompletionEntries, /*equalityComparer*/ undefined, /*allowDuplicates*/ true);
1393	    }
1394	
1395	    if (!isChecked) {
1396	        getJSCompletionEntries(sourceFile, location.pos, uniqueNames, getEmitScriptTarget(compilerOptions), entries);
1397	    }
1398	
1399	    let caseBlock: CaseBlock | undefined;
1400	    if (
1401	        preferences.includeCompletionsWithInsertText
1402	        && contextToken
1403	        && !isRightOfOpenTag
1404	        && !isRightOfDotOrQuestionDot
1405	        && (caseBlock = findAncestor(contextToken, isCaseBlock))
1406	    ) {
1407	        const cases = getExhaustiveCaseSnippets(caseBlock, sourceFile, preferences, compilerOptions, host, program, formatContext);
1408	        if (cases) {
1409	            entries.push(cases.entry);
1410	        }
1411	    }
1412	
1413	    return {
1414	        flags: completionData.flags,
1415	        isGlobalCompletion: isInSnippetScope,
1416	        isIncomplete: preferences.allowIncompleteCompletions && hasUnresolvedAutoImports ? true : undefined,
1417	        isMemberCompletion: isMemberCompletionKind(completionKind),
1418	        isNewIdentifierLocation,
1419	        optionalReplacementSpan: getOptionalReplacementSpan(location),
1420	        entries,
1421	        defaultCommitCharacters: defaultCommitCharacters ?? getDefaultCommitCharacters(isNewIdentifierLocation),
1422	    };
1423	}
1424	
1425	function isCheckedFile(sourceFile: SourceFile, compilerOptions: CompilerOptions): boolean {
1426	    return !isSourceFileJS(sourceFile) || !!isCheckJsEnabledForFile(sourceFile, compilerOptions);
1427	}
1428	
1429	function getExhaustiveCaseSnippets(
1430	    caseBlock: CaseBlock,
1431	    sourceFile: SourceFile,
1432	    preferences: UserPreferences,
1433	    options: CompilerOptions,
1434	    host: LanguageServiceHost,
1435	    program: Program,
1436	    formatContext: formatting.FormatContext | undefined,
1437	): { entry: CompletionEntry; importAdder: codefix.ImportAdder; } | undefined {
1438	    const clauses = caseBlock.clauses;
1439	    const checker = program.getTypeChecker();
1440	    const switchType = checker.getTypeAtLocation(caseBlock.parent.expression);
1441	    if (switchType && switchType.isUnion() && every(switchType.types, type => type.isLiteral())) {
1442	        // Collect constant values in existing clauses.
1443	        const tracker = newCaseClauseTracker(checker, clauses);
1444	
1445	        const target = getEmitScriptTarget(options);
1446	        const quotePreference = getQuotePreference(sourceFile, preferences);
1447	        const importAdder = codefix.createImportAdder(sourceFile, program, preferences, host);
1448	        const elements: Expression[] = [];
1449	        for (const type of switchType.types as LiteralType[]) {
1450	            // Enums
1451	            if (type.flags & TypeFlags.EnumLiteral) {
1452	                Debug.assert(type.symbol, "An enum member type should have a symbol");
1453	                Debug.assert(type.symbol.parent, "An enum member type should have a parent symbol (the enum symbol)");
1454	                // Filter existing enums by their values
1455	                const enumValue = type.symbol.valueDeclaration && checker.getConstantValue(type.symbol.valueDeclaration as EnumMember);
1456	                if (enumValue !== undefined) {
1457	                    if (tracker.hasValue(enumValue)) {
1458	                        continue;
1459	                    }
1460	                    tracker.addValue(enumValue);
1461	                }
1462	                const typeNode = codefix.typeToAutoImportableTypeNode(checker, importAdder, type, caseBlock, target);
1463	                if (!typeNode) {
1464	                    return undefined;
1465	                }
1466	                const expr = typeNodeToExpression(typeNode, target, quotePreference);
1467	                if (!expr) {
1468	                    return undefined;
1469	                }
1470	                elements.push(expr);
1471	            }
1472	            // Literals
1473	            else if (!tracker.hasValue(type.value)) {
1474	                switch (typeof type.value) {
1475	                    case "object":
1476	                        elements.push(type.value.negative ? factory.createPrefixUnaryExpression(SyntaxKind.MinusToken, factory.createBigIntLiteral({ negative: false, base10Value: type.value.base10Value })) : factory.createBigIntLiteral(type.value));
1477	                        break;
1478	                    case "number":
1479	                        elements.push(type.value < 0 ? factory.createPrefixUnaryExpression(SyntaxKind.MinusToken, factory.createNumericLiteral(-type.value)) : factory.createNumericLiteral(type.value));
1480	                        break;
1481	                    case "string":
1482	                        elements.push(factory.createStringLiteral(type.value, quotePreference === QuotePreference.Single));
1483	                        break;
1484	                }
1485	            }
1486	        }
1487	        if (elements.length === 0) {
1488	            return undefined;
1489	        }
1490	
1491	        const newClauses = map(elements, element => factory.createCaseClause(element, []));
1492	        const newLineChar = getNewLineOrDefaultFromHost(host, formatContext?.options);
1493	        const printer = createSnippetPrinter({
1494	            removeComments: true,
1495	            module: options.module,
1496	            moduleResolution: options.moduleResolution,
1497	            target: options.target,
1498	            newLine: getNewLineKind(newLineChar),
1499	        });
